title: Incorrect Results for Comparison Operators on inet Datatype
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE network (address IPv4 NOT NULL, description String);
INSERT INTO network VALUES (IPv4('172.16.0.1'), 'Another Private Network');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM network WHERE address BETWEEN IPv4('10.0.0.0') AND IPv4('192.168.1.255');
key_bug_features: Comparison operators on inet datatype yield incorrect results
